title: SOÑANDO JUNTOS - 211info
text: LATINO NETWORK SOÑANDO JUNTOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits with a focus on school preparation and healthy development. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 283-6881 [email protected] Luz Villanueva Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Home Based Parenting Education * Hispanic/Latino Community School Readiness Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS AL KINDER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS APRENDEMOS EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLEGIO DE PADRES/PARENTS COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ESCALERA EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ESCALERA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRECIENDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PADRINOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UNIDOS FOR OREGON LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALING INITIATIVE LEGAL SERVICES - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CONEXIONES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NINTH GRADE COUNTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - P3 COORDINATORS UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
